stemHtml: A runway is covered over the total length with 5 mm depth of wet ice. In terms of runway contamination, ‘’wet ice’’ is…

options.a: ice crystals formed from airborne moisture on a surface on a surface whose temperature is at or below freezing.
options.b: water that has frozen or compacted snow that has transitioned into ice in cold and dry conditions.
options.c: ice with water on top of it or ice that is melting.
options.d: snow that has been compacted into a solid mass.
